name: V2Y Corporation Ltd.
summary: V2Y Corporation Ltd., an ecommerce company, provides end-to-end commerce enablement and fulfillment solutions for the body, beauty, and baby sectors in the Southeast Asia. It operates in three segments: E-Commerce, E-Logistics, and Insurtech. The company offers solutions through cloud-based platform that leverages on technology, such as cloud computing, big data analytics, and artificial intelligence. Its solutions include various aspects of the e-commerce value chain covering technology, online store operations, content and channel management, digital marketing, customer service, warehousing, and fulfilment. The company also provides third party administration for extended warranty and accidental damage protection services, as well as after sales support and call center services for customers in the computer, consumer electronics, and communication sectors. In addition, it is involved in the wholesale of other household goods; and provision of value added logistic, and other information technology and computer services. The company was formerly known as Synagie Corporation Ltd. and changed its name to V2Y Corporation Ltd. in November 2020. V2Y Corporation Ltd. was founded in 2014 and is based in Singapore.
